title: memory leak (of InstrRecord) in opt_mergetable
key_bug_features: memory leak in opt_mergetable during select operation
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value INT, name VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (value, name) VALUES (1, 'Test1'), (2, 'Test2'), (3, NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day';
